title: Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Mysuru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates:
Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates!
